review: I've been to Double Decker a few times and it's always been a great spot in Ybor. They have karaoke and a really diverse crowd, which I love. The bar upstairs is convenient for a quick drink. It's about what you'd expect from a place in Ybor City, but I think it does a good job capturing the vibe of Tampa. I've had a great time here and would recommend it to anyone looking for a fun night out.
